title: Vanilla.Optimized
description: A clientside modpack with lots of quality of life mods!
body:
## Alpha - This modpack is still on work!
# Vanilla.Optimized 

 This Modpack is all you want! It's Vanilla styled so you can join a Vanilla server with this pack! This modpack is for everyone who want's the best Minecraft experience in vanilla minecraft. It adds an hole bunch of quality-of-life mods for the best gameplay in minecraft. 
 
 For example:
 - Xaeros Minimap/Worldmap
- Mouse Wheelie
- Sodium
- Essential Mod


It also comes with some Shaders ready to use! From lowend to hardcore: Everything is there.


```
You should give this pack a minimum of 4 GB RAM. 6 GB+ is recommended!
```
 
**Make sure you take a look at the resource packs that are coming with it!**






<details>
<summary>Special Thanks:</summary>

- Professor Joni: He tested thIS pack and had lot's of mod-ideas!

</details>
